Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to update a given DECLARE constraint model represented as a Python dictionary to include new constraints that mitigate bias in a loan application process The process involves activities like StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The prompt suggests adding activities related to sensitive attributes eg CheckApplicantRace Approve Minority Reject Minority ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets refine the activities to be added CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck Approve Reject

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Or maybe Approve Minority Reject Minority The prompt uses eg Approve Minority or Reject Minority but also says decision steps Approve Reject Lets use Approve Reject CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck to keep it general but effective Actually lets include CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck Approve Reject

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says If a decision step occurs for a sensitive applicant eg Approve Minority or Reject Minority ensure a ManualReview activity always coexists in the trace

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets add coexistence for Reject and ManualReview and maybe CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview Better yet lets define the activities CheckApplicantRace ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck Reject Approve

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This implies nonchainsuccession or nonsuccession The prompt says Prevent a direct succession from a sensitive attribute event eg CheckApplicantRace to a decision event Reject to avoid immediate biased outcomes This is exactly nonchainsuccession or nonsuccession

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets use nonchainsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject and Approve Also maybe response from CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck If CheckApplicantRace happens BiasMitigationCheck must happen eventually

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If CheckApplicantRace triggers BiasMitigationCheck via response that means BiasMitigationCheck must occur sometime after CheckApplicantRace And nonchainsuccession prevents CheckApplicantRace from being immediately followed by Reject Approve This matches cannot immediately follow without first performing a BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: To strictly enforce without first performing a BiasMitigationCheck we might need precedence Lets add precedence BiasMitigationCheck to Reject and Approve

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This ensures that if Reject or Approve happens BiasMitigationCheck must have happened before it Combined with response from CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck this enforces if CheckApplicantRace happens BiasMitigationCheck must happen and decisions cannot occur before it

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This perfectly satisfies all prompt instructions Coexistence for sensitive applicant decisions and ManualReview Response from CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck Precedence so decisions require BiasMitigationCheck first Nonchainsuccession so CheckApplicantRace cannot be immediately followed by decisions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The updated dictionary includes coexistence response precedence succession and nonchainsuccession in valid Python dictionary structure with support and confidence values
